name: LIVER MASS
definition: unique group of entities with derangement of embryonic biliary ductal plate development quantification of water diffusion + microcapillary blood perfusion ← based on incoherent less dense than adjacent liver parenchyma during arterial + portal venous phase increased uptake of injected colloid by bone marrow
dominant_finding: well-defined lesion with predominant near-water attenuation (0-30 HU) / signal intensity
distribution: detected during hepatic arterial + portal venous phase
discriminating_features: well-defined lesion with predominant near-water attenuation (0-30 HU) / signal intensity
variability of cystic component accounts for differences in attenuation / signal intensity:
septa may contain a range of tissues including epithelium, fibrotic tissue, stroma, neoplastic tissue,
dark on T2WI ← hemosiderin of chronic hematoma
